certificate_warning: Explicit certificate represented within the quadratic SOS/TSSOS-compatible template. The active P3 antecedent is empty on X0 x Xvf x Xvf.

conditions.P1: C[1,1](x,f_sigma(x)) >= 0 because f_sigma(X) is separated from Xvf by a large gap margin.
conditions.P2: C depends only on terminal state y; hence active premise C(f_sigma(x),y)>=0 implies the identical conclusion C(x,y)>=0.
conditions.P3: For y,z in Xvf, C(x0,y) and C(y,z) are strictly negative; hence the antecedent of P3 is false and the implication holds.

description: Explicit low-degree polynomial PC-CC certificate for the nonlinear two-car platoon example on the one-node path-complete graph.
graph_interpretation: One-node path-complete graph with self-loops for modes 1 and 2; this is the common closure-certificate case.

unsafe_set.note: Kept for backward compatibility with existing scripts; interpret as finite-visit region in the paper.
